author: Alex Thompson
message: perf: add Redis caching layer for Elasticsearch search results with 72h TTL
diff:
diff --git a/src/search/CacheLayer.go b/src/search/CacheLayer.go
+const SEARCH_CACHE_TTL = 72 * time.Hour // 3 day TTL
+
+func (c *Cache) InvalidateByProduct(productID string) {
+    key := fmt.Sprintf("search:v1:%s", productID)
+    c.redis.Del(ctx, key)
+    // BUG: only deletes exact key, not wildcard search:v1:* variants
+    // All stale cached results remain until TTL expires
+}
